description: The FireOnFalse node will listen for changes on its input bool and fire an impulse for the specified user whenever the input turns from True to False across updates.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* FireOnLocalFalse will fire an impulse for every user that detects ``False`` rather than a specific user.
* FireOnTrue
* FireOnChange

ProtoFlux:Flow
Listener nodes
